title: Source Evidence Backfill Plan
定位: 只读审查 + 回填方案设计。不写 DB，不执行回填，不改 importer。

source-evidence-coverage.reason: ALL 446 TeachingTaskClass links created before K20-FIX-B added source evidence fields

backfill-feasibility.importBatchId: SAFE — deterministic via TeachingTask.join, no artifact needed
backfill-feasibility.sourceRowIndex: FEASIBLE with artifact — re-match records to TeachingTaskClass
backfill-feasibility.sourceKeyword: FEASIBLE with artifact — re-run class name matching
backfill-feasibility.sourceClassName: FEASIBLE with artifact — re-run class name matching
backfill-feasibility.sourceRemark: FEASIBLE with artifact — re-extract from parsed records
backfill-feasibility.sourceArtifactFilename: SAFE — static value from confirmed batch
backfill-feasibility.matchStrategy: RISKY — requires re-running importer matching logic, may differ from original

candidate-strategies.A-no-backfill: 保持 forward-only. 最安全，诊断缺口继续存在
candidate-strategies.B-importBatchId-only: 只回填 importBatchId via TeachingTask join. 安全中高，价值有限
candidate-strategies.C-artifact-based: 读取 JSON artifact + 复跑匹配. 价值高，风险高
candidate-strategies.D-manual-reviewed: 生成候选 JSON + 管理员确认. 最安全可写路线
candidate-strategies.E-prohibit: 明确历史 evidence 不可信. 最保守

recommendation: K39-C1: dry-run candidate generator（不写 DB）

recommended-next.scope: 读取 confirmed batch JSON artifact + TeachingTask join → 生成 backfill candidates JSON
